summary: Completed comprehensive audit testing of Titelli platform - Iteration 15. All backend APIs pass (33/33 tests). Frontend pages and flows working correctly including new /emplois and /produits routes, job application flow with CV redirect, enterprise dashboard creation forms, and client dashboard.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All major features tested and working: 1) /emplois page shows 8 job offers with filters, 2) /produits page works as alias for /products, 3) Enterprise dashboard job/training/service/product creation modals work correctly, 4) Job application flow with CV redirect (returnToJob parameter) works correctly, 5) Enterprise profile with logo/cover image editing works, 6) Client dashboard all tabs working, 7) Influencer dashboard working, 8) Cart and checkout flow working, 9) Enterprise detail page shows cover images and logos correctly

emplois_page.details: Page loads correctly with 8 job offers, search and type filters working

produits_page.details: Page loads correctly as alias for /products

enterprise_job_creation.details: Modal opens with all fields: title, description, contract type, location, salary min/max

enterprise_training_creation.details: Modal opens with all fields: title, description, type, duration, price, location, dates, max participants, category, prerequisites

job_application_flow.details: When client has no CV, link redirects to documents with returnToJob parameter. Alert banner shows with 'Voir l'offre' button

enterprise_images.details: Cover images and logos display correctly on /entreprises list and detail pages

enterprise_profile.details: Logo and cover image upload sections visible with change/delete buttons

enterprise_postulations.details: Shows applications with filter tabs (Toutes, En attente, En examen, Acceptées, Refusées), CV link, accept/reject buttons

enterprise_ia_ciblage.details: Shows client stats, client list with filters, and AI campaigns

client_dashboard.details: All tabs working: overview, profile, documents, orders, cashback, etc.

client_documents.details: CV category available in document upload modal (first option)

influencer_dashboard.details: Dashboard loads with stats, social networks section, sidebar navigation

services_page.details: Page loads with category filters and 20 service cards

cart_checkout.details: Add to cart works, cart page shows items with quantity controls, checkout button visible
